title: RTX ON ORES AND WEAPONS
description: RTX ON but with many more ores and weapons to increase your immersion.
body: Another sequel to the RTX ON franchise is here, with hundreds of new ores, from tin to titanium to even nether ores! This mod also introduces many new items such as titanium weapons and drills to maximize mining efficiency. This mod also has insane graphics and VR support to further maximize your immersion. This mod also runs the latest 1.21.5. So download this game and get mining!
